title: ferray-stride-tricks: as_strided_signed with isize strides + base offset
description: Follow-up from #524. Negative-stride support needs a new API that takes (source, shape, strides_isize, start_offset) — flipping &[usize] to &[isize] alone isn't enough because the underlying ArrayView::from_shape_ptr expects strides relative to source[0], and negative strides need the base pointer near the end of the buffer.
